g.text: Match Monitor Group Betting - Staging Flow (Insert Ticket Detail)
All inserts run in PARALLEL using:
- Each pool has same data but different PoolType
Example: If last ticket has SequenceID = 12346678
This marks the last processed SequenceID
- Parallel insert: Simultaneous to all pools
- Idempotent: Safe to re-run (SequenceID prevents duplicates)
